text.en: Thomas Cover and Peter Hart formalized nearest-neighbor pattern classification, showing how labeled examples could support nonparametric classification by local proximity. The result made instance-based learning a durable baseline for pattern recognition and machine learning.
text.zh: 托马斯·科弗和彼得·哈特形式化了最近邻模式分类，说明已标注样本如何通过局部距离支持非参数分类。这个结果使基于实例的学习成为模式识别和机器学习中的长期基线。
